svg.text: Connected medallion workflow with deletion, deduplication, and intrusion controls
Control Layer Embedded Into The Workflow
ADLS soft delete, versioning, replay from Event Hubs and bronze
Event-time handling, deterministic keys, idempotent serving loads
Access anomalies, delete events, drift, freshness, and lag alerts
1. Replay survives downstream failure through Event Hubs retention and bronze recovery.
2. Curated layers remain trusted through deterministic duplicate suppression.
3. Intrusion and tamper indicators are surfaced through Azure monitoring and storage controls.
4. Serving is rebuildable from curated storage instead of being the only recoverable copy.
